zh.lifeSummary: 當Heloise d’Evereux於1066年出生在法國諾門迪時，她的父親Walter d'Evreux34歲，母親Philippa Normandie30歲。她和Brian de Brampton至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1105年在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾亨廷格頓享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heloise d’Evereux于1066年出生在法国諾門迪时，她的父亲Walter d'Evreux34岁，母亲Philippa Normandie30岁。她和Brian de Brampton至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1105年在英国英格兰坎布利其爾亨廷格頓享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: d’Evereux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, Sean.
English and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name for someone from Évreux in Eure, France, with the preposition d(e). See also Everest for the name without the preposition.

History: This was the surname of the Earls of Essex from 1572 to 1641. Walter Devereux, 1st Earl of Essex, led an attempted colonization of Ulster, and his son, Robert, 2nd Earl of Essex, briefly held the position of lord lieutenant of Ireland in 1599.

variants.name: Devereaux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Everest
meanings: English (southeastern): of Norman origin, a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de). Compare Evers .

variants.name: Evers
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Devereux without the fused preposition (Old French de).

English: de-aspirated variant of Heaver, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Hever (Kent), named from Old English hēah ‘high’ + (Kentish) Old English ēfre ‘edge or brow of a hill’. Alternatively, the name may derive from some minor place in southeastern England named with Old English ȳfre, (Kentish) Old English ēfre, Middle English evere ‘edge or brow of a hill, tip of a promontory’, with the addition of a prosthetic H-.
North German and Dutch: genitivized patronymic from the personal name Evert , which lost its t in pronunciation and spelling subsequently; compare Everts . Compare also Avers .

variants.name: Deveraux
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devery
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Kieran, Brendan, Clancy.
Irish (Offaly): of Norman origin, a variant of   Devereux  .

variants.name: Devary
meanings: Probably Irish: variant of Devery, a variant of Devereux in counties Leix and Offaly.

variants.name: Debrow
meanings: Altered form of English or Irish   Devereux  .

nameMeanings.name: Heloise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of   Éloise  , which enjoyed a revival of popularity in the 18th century after publication of  Rousseau's  philosophical novel La Nouvelle Héloïse (  1761 ).

variants.name: Éloise
meanings: variant of   Éloise  , which enjoyed a revival of popularity in the 18th century after publication of  Rousseau's  philosophical novel La Nouvelle Héloïse (  1761 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Heloise d’Evereux was born in 1066, in Normandy, France, her father, Walter d'Evreux, was 34 and her mother, Philippa Normandie, was 30. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Brian de Brampton. She died in 1105, in Huntingdon, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heloise d’Evereux est née en 1066, à Normandie, France, son père, Walter d'Evreux, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Philippa Normandie, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Brian de Brampton. Elle est décédée en 1105, à Huntingdon, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heloise d’Evereux 1066 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter d'Evreux 34 und ihre Mutter Philippa Normandie 30. Sie hatte mit Brian de Brampton mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1105 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Huntingdon, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heloise d’Evereux è nata il nel 1066 nel Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Walter d'Evreux, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Philippa Normandie, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Brian de Brampton. Morì nel 1105, nel Huntingdon, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Heloise d’Evereuxが1066年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Walter d'Evreuxは34歳，母Philippa Normandieは30歳であった。彼女はBrian de Bramptonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1105年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアハンティングドンで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Heloise d’Evereux(이)가 1066년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter d'Evreux(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Philippa Normandie(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Brian de Brampton(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1105년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 헌틴그던에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heloise d’Evereux nasceu em 1066, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Walter d'Evreux, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Normandie, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Brian de Brampton. Ela faleceu em 1105, em Huntingdon, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heloise d’Evereux родилась в 1066 г. в местности норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Walter d'Evreux было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Philippa Normandie, 30. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Brian de Brampton. Она умерла в 1105 г. в местности хантингдон, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heloise d’Evereux nació en 1066, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Walter d'Evreux, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Philippa Normandie, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Brian de Brampton. Murió en 1105, en Huntingdon, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 39 años.
